results.summary: CLI command launched and printed available converter subcommands

文档缺失或不完整项: README points to quickstart/model docs but does not provide a single repository-level unit test command.
Install guide says one-click install installs Megatron-LM, MindSpeed and MindSpeed MM, but using the official image plus pip install -e . did not provide a usable megatron module for full UT.
Official image documentation does not mention the observed torch_npu import failure caused by an Ascend runtime symbol mismatch on this host.
pip config in the image includes https://mirrors.huaweicloud.com/ascend/repos/pypi, whose certificate appears expired in this environment, causing repeated SSL warnings.

遇到的问题和处理.problem: Initial local rsync to remote failed due to permission/path issues and was slow when retried.
遇到的问题和处理.resolution: Stopped rsync and cloned the GitCode repository directly on the remote server.

遇到的问题和处理.problem: torch_npu import failed in the official container despite NPU visibility.
遇到的问题和处理.resolution: Recorded as environment/runtime mismatch; used TORCH_DEVICE_BACKEND_AUTOLOAD=0 for CPU-safe smoke and UT subset to avoid automatic torch_npu backend loading.
遇到的问题和处理.source: Container command: python -c 'import torch; import torch_npu'

遇到的问题和处理.problem: Configured Ascend PyPI mirror certificate expired.
遇到的问题和处理.resolution: pip continued using https://repo.huaweicloud.com/repository/pypi/simple and installation succeeded.

遇到的问题和处理.problem: Full unit test suite failed partially due to missing megatron module.
遇到的问题和处理.resolution: Recorded as missing dependency/environment gap. Did not install extra dependencies outside documented official image + pip install -e . workflow.

遇到的问题和处理.problem: Chunkloss unit tests still OOM when all 8 NPUs are visible.
遇到的问题和处理.error: All three failures report torch.OutOfMemoryError on NPU 0 while trying to allocate 9.26 GiB.
遇到的问题和处理.resolution: Recorded as a single-card test-design/resource issue. ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES exposes 8 cards, but this pytest invocation does not initialize distributed/tensor parallel execution, so tensors are not sharded across 8 cards.
